[There are many methods used for BT rectification. I have
mentioned only two of them. Let the sages know the other
two by their own meditation about the subject]
Thus it becomes clear that only these 4 multiples are
accepted by Skanda for BT rectification. Skanda Hora directs
us to Use only the Varga Chatushtaya method for BT
rectification. Sage told Brihat Saunaka hora after discussing
these 4 multiples and their use~ BT rectification, tells us-

[If 2 or more of these multiples indicates a particular BT,
accept the same as correct BT (or make the necessary
correction in the given BT to accomplish the same)]
Let us understand the Varga Chatushtaya method with
better clarity.
